case_title: VICTOR AYALA VS. VICTOR HUGO SEGURA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AYALA, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SEGURA, VICTOR HUGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $50 SERVICE FEE, SERVED SEP-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEGURA, VICTOR HUGO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALA, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEGURA, VICTOR HUGO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SEGURA, VICTOR HUGO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.
